title: Cameron Sinclair Harris Speak Now Or Forever Hold Your Peace Work In Progress
description: Dearly beloved. Please be seated. This is a participatory event. You are invited to celebrate the union between The Bride & her darling groom Nathaniel on their Special Day. There’s The Bride now! Blushing, presumably. Giddily, she waits for her sweet prince Nathaniel to join her at the altar. Still waiting. There she is! Yup. Still waiting. She waits. & dreams. & waits. Cameron Sinclair Harris returns to Brighton Fringe with her second solo show, the follow-up to her cosmic hour 'PLANETS!!!'. Follow the Bride through an anarchic hour of love, longing, puppets, lemons & the Radio Times. This is not a Work In Progress. It is a Wedding In Progress.
content_warnings: Audience interaction, food & liquid consumption, references to mental health & transphobia

venue.name: Junk Poets at Caravanserai
venue.address: North of St Peters Church, York Place, East Sussex
